name: Facility Geolocation and Industry Classification Config
description: You are an Occupational Health and Safety Technician at a petrochemical bulk storage terminal. Start EPA Tier2 Submit 2025. Create a new facility record with the following base information: Facility Name: 'Gulf Coast Petroleum Terminal', Address: '100 Tidal Road', City: 'Deer Park', State: 'TX', ZIP: '77536', County: 'Harris'. Then, you must accurately configure the facility's mandatory geographic and industry classification metadata. Navigate to the Facility Identification section and enter: Latitude: '29.670100', Longitude: '-95.123800', Lat/Long Method: 'Interpolation-Map', Lat/Long Description: 'Center of Facility', NAICS Code: '424710'. Finally, export the facility data to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\gulf_coast_configured.t2s'.
